Activity Stream
Gadget URL
Lists recent activity in a single project, or in all projects.
Alert
Create custom pop up alerts to flag important context.
Align
Align the content of the macro as you choose.
Analytics List
Display Confluence metrics as a list for a space or page using Viewtracker analytics data.
Analytics Tiles
Display Confluence metrics as tiles for a space or page using Viewtracker analytics data.
Assigned to Me
Gadget URL
Displays all unresolved issues assigned to me
Category
Create a link to a category from key.
Chart
Display a chart
Html-bobswift
Add HTML data to a Confluence page. (See documentation for information on coming removal of username/password parameters)
Find more macros...

Insert 'Html-bobswift' Macro

Add HTML data to a Confluence page. (See documentation for information on coming removal of username/password parameters)

Documentation
  • html – data is treated as html.
  • xhtml – data is treated as xhtml and rendered with the Confluence xhtml renderer.
  • wiki – data surrounded by a noformat macro.

Choose a profile to access data from a remote system.

↻ Preview
Html-bobswift
